# SSC Jewellery

> Sree Sai Collections / SSC Jewellery is an online imitation and fashion jewellery storefront serving shoppers looking for anklets, chains, rings, offers, best sellers, new arrivals, and category collections.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://www.sscjewels.com/
- Shop: https://www.sscjewels.com/shop
- About: https://www.sscjewels.com/about
- Contact: https://www.sscjewels.com/contact
- FAQ: https://www.sscjewels.com/faq
- Shipping Policy: https://www.sscjewels.com/shipping
- Refund Policy: https://www.sscjewels.com/refund
- Terms: https://www.sscjewels.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://www.sscjewels.com/privacy
- Sitemap: https://www.sscjewels.com/sitemap.xml

## AI-Friendly Reference

- Full site summary: https://www.sscjewels.com/llms-full.md
- Markdown mirrors index: https://www.sscjewels.com/markdown/

## Crawl Guidance

Public storefront pages may be crawled and summarized. Private customer/admin areas such as login, profile, wishlist, orders, cart, checkout, payment result pages, and admin routes should not be crawled or indexed.

Use page titles, descriptions, product/category content, structured data, and policy pages as the primary source of truth. Product availability, prices, offers, and shipping/payment terms can change and should be verified from the live page.
